task_completion.description: Log in to OpenMaint as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint dashboard or application interface is visible in the browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Open and read the power_topology.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of 'power_topology.txt' from the desktop.

task_completion.description: Create dependency relationship: Transformer to Switchgear
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface shows a saved relation (of any CI-to-CI type) between ELEC-XFMR-001 and ELEC-SWGR-001.

task_completion.description: Create dependency relationship: Switchgear to Distribution Panel 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface shows a saved relation (of any CI-to-CI type) between ELEC-SWGR-001 and ELEC-DP-001.

task_completion.description: Create dependency relationship: Switchgear to Distribution Panel 2
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface shows a saved relation (of any CI-to-CI type) between ELEC-SWGR-001 and ELEC-DP-002.

task_completion.description: Create dependency relationship: Switchgear to ATS
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface shows a saved relation (of any CI-to-CI type) between ELEC-SWGR-001 and ELEC-ATS-001.

task_completion.description: Create dependency relationship: ATS to UPS
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface shows a saved relation (of any CI-to-CI type) between ELEC-ATS-001 and ELEC-UPS-001.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to create relationships
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the OpenMaint web interface in a browser to add relations, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or psql) to inject data directly into the database.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenMaint application
integrity.visual_evidence: The relations must be visible within the OpenMaint system UI (e.g., in the relations tab of the CI cards or a relation graph), not just typed out in a text file or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to modify the DOM to falsely display the relationships.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 5 power dependency relations between 6 electrical Configuration Items (CIs) in OpenMaint. The required relations are: 1) ELEC-XFMR-001 -> ELEC-SWGR-001, 2) ELEC-SWGR-001 -> ELEC-DP-001, 3) ELEC-SWGR-001 -> ELEC-DP-002, 4) ELEC-SWGR-001 -> ELEC-ATS-001, 5) ELEC-ATS-001 -> ELEC-UPS-001. Any valid CI-to-CI relation type available in the system is acceptable as long as it links the correct pairs.
